name: Priya Raman
title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
summary: Full-stack engineer who has shipped three production SaaS products end-to-end. Leads a small team, owns the Next.js front-end and Node microservices, and has migrated a monolith to AWS without downtime.

name: Daniel Okafor
title: Machine Learning Engineer
education: M.S. Data Science, Carnegie Mellon University
summary: Builds credit-risk models for a pan-African lender. Took the last model from notebook to production on SageMaker, cut default rate by 11%. Comfortable moving between research and engineering.

name: Hannah Liu
title: Growth Marketing Manager
education: B.A. Marketing, University of British Columbia
summary: Grew a DTC skincare brand from 30k to 400k monthly visitors in 18 months. Owns the full funnel — paid, SEO, lifecycle — and runs roughly 10 experiments per quarter with documented lift.

name: Marcus Bennett
title: Senior Product Designer
summary: Led the redesign of a 4-million-user consumer app. Built and maintains the in-house design system used by 40+ designers and engineers. Strong on research-led decisions and accessibility.

name: Aisha Khan
title: Financial Analyst
summary: FP&A analyst at a listed manufacturer. Owns the annual operating plan and rolling forecast, partners closely with business unit heads, and has rebuilt the costing model currently used board-wide.

name: Jonas Keller
title: DevOps / Platform Engineer
summary: Nine years running production infrastructure. Rebuilt the deployment pipeline at a 300-engineer SaaS company; mean time to deploy dropped from 45 minutes to 6. Strong opinions on reliability and cost.

name: Rhea D'Souza
title: Product Manager
summary: Product manager at a vertical SaaS company. Runs discovery with ~15 customers per quarter, owns two core modules, and shipped a billing redesign that lifted paid conversion by 18%.

name: Oluwaseun Ade
title: Brand & Content Marketer
education: B.A. English Literature, University of Cape Town
summary: Two-person marketing team at a Series A SaaS company. Writes the newsletter (14k subs), runs the blog, and rewrote the homepage ahead of the last fundraise. Prefers a generalist role.

name: Elena Ruiz
title: UX Researcher
summary: Research lead for a mobile banking product used by 2M+ customers in Europe. Runs diary studies, benchmark usability, and customer interviews. Has a measurable track record of shaping roadmap.

name: Arjun Malhotra
title: Data Analyst
education: B.Sc. Mathematics, St. Stephen's College Delhi
summary: Analyst on the growth team at an e-commerce marketplace. Built the self-serve experimentation dashboard and owns weekly business reviews for category heads. Strong SQL and communication.

name: Sophie Laurent
title: Senior Backend Engineer
summary: Backend specialist at a payments company. Has owned services that process 3k TPS at peak. Comfortable with both greenfield work and stabilizing legacy systems. Long notice period.

name: Neha Agarwal
title: Corporate Development Associate
education: CA; B.Com, Shri Ram College of Commerce
summary: Five years between an IB analyst seat at a bulge bracket and corp-dev at a unicorn. Closed two bolt-on acquisitions end-to-end. Looking to stay on the operator side of the table.

name: Tom Richards
title: Visual / Graphic Designer
education: B.A. Graphic Design, Central Saint Martins
summary: Four years across two creative agencies. Has led identity work for three consumer brands, including a rebrand that picked up a D&AD Wood Pencil. Wants to move in-house next.

name: Kavya Iyer
title: Associate Product Manager
summary: APM on a social product with 8M monthly actives. Owns the onboarding surface; her last experiment improved day-7 retention by 6%. Early-career but already ships independently.

name: Liam O'Connor
title: Senior Data Scientist
summary: Senior DS embedded with the pricing team at a ride-hailing marketplace. Runs large-scale switchback experiments; authored the internal guide on causal inference. Mentors two juniors.
